metadata.name: mindoptpy

documentation:
====================
README for mindoptpy
====================

DESCRIPTION
===========
**mindoptpy** is a Python wrapper around **mindopt** with **Cython**.

**MindOpt** optimization solver is an efficient optimization problem solving software, which can be widely used in scientific research, electric power and energy, industrial manufacturing, transportation and logistics, retail, finance, cloud computing and other fields. It is the core of industrial software and a powerful tool to help enterprises "reduce cost and increase efficiency".

Reporting
=========
It may contain a number of unknown bugs and/or performance issues. Should
the solver crash for an unclear reason, or terminate with an incorrect
status, please do not hesitate to report the issue to:

    solver.damo@list.alibaba-inc.com
